use_cases: Display client or partner logos as social proof on a homepage
Showcase trusted brands in a continuous horizontal scrolling banner
Highlight sponsors or integrations in a subtle animated showcase
Build trust by displaying press mentions or media outlets
Create a brand recognition strip for landing pages
ai_summary: A marquee-style brand scroller component that continuously animates company logos and names in a horizontal scrolling motion with edge fade masks. Features brand icons from Spotify, YouTube, Amazon, and Google displayed in a clean, minimalist layout. Includes both forward and reverse scrolling variants for flexible design placement.
